title: vaginal_discharge (starter evidence summary)
text:
STARTER EVIDENCE SUMMARY (placeholder)
- This is a starter note so the RAG store has at least one document.
- Replace/expand this with real guideline content via your manifest fetcher.
- Phone-only constraints: no exam, no vitals, no tests. Triage is based on red flags and symptom severity.
- Tier 1 model: AI suggests likely causes and a plan, but clinician approves or edits meds and disposition.
